'''Ruisto''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
Ruisto was a mostly terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]] with small, high-[[Salt/Legends|saline]] [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]].<ref name="SOR" /> It was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to a colony of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who had built small [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the planet.<ref name="RES" />

==History==
Between [[4400 BBY|4400]] and [[4200 BBY]], Ruisto became the very first world colonized by the Mon Calamari outside their [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|own]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]].<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="SOR" />

In [[4166 BBY]], [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] made the first contact with Mon Calamari [[Starship/Legends|starships]] near Ruisto during the expansion of the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].<ref name="TEA" />

In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the aged [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Therbon/Legends|Therbon]] grew frustrated with his inability to retake [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].<ref name="SOR" /> Since the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] had been unwilling to gather a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] large enough to assault the Mon Calamari [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], the Mon Calamari colony on Ruisto became a suitable substitute target. The Empire deployed an [[assault fleet]] comprised of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] to [[Bombardment of Ruisto|bombard]] Ruisto.<ref name="RES" /> During the attack, Grand Moff Therbon ordered a [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|sustained]] [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] that [[Mundicide|wiped out]] all life on Ruisto.<ref name="SOR" />
